basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi has released the official notification for 1 Project Scientist posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation as per GoI Rules

qualification.education_qualification: First-class or equivalent degree in B.Tech/M.Sc. in Condensed Matter Physics/Solid State Physics/ Nanoscience & Technology/Materials Science or equivalent
qualification.details: First-class or equivalent degree in B.Tech/M.Sc. in Condensed Matter Physics/Solid State Physics/ Nanoscience & Technology/Materials Science or equivalent. Desirable: Candidates qualified in examinations such as GATE, CSIR-UGC-NET, including lectureship, IIT JAM, or their equivalents. Expertise in thin film deposition, especially plasma-based physical or chemical vapor deposition methods, material analysis and characterization, plasma based deposition of functional materials, optical analysis, photonics and material characterization, scientific writing with peer-reviewed publications.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on advertised qualification and desirable requirements Online Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Project Scientist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Delhi Project Scientist position is 28 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First-class or equivalent degree in B.Tech/M.Sc. in specific fields like Condensed Matter Physics, Solid State Physics, Nanoscience & Technology, or Materials Science.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Scientist post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be done for the Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications and desirable criteria, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 47,790 to Rs. 62,350 per month, plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis for the Project Scientist position at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: You need to apply via email by sending your complete application along with required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section provided in this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this IIT Delhi Project Scientist recruitment is IITD/IRD/124/2026.
